case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. LUCIO MOISES VAZQUEZ SOBERANIS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-13-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT LUCIO MOISES VAZQUEZ SOBERANIS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VAZQUEZ SOBERANIS, LUCIO MOISES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES. DEFENDANT LUCIA MOISES VAZQUEZ SOBERANIS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED AND STATED THE CASE HAS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
